summary: Post-validation hardening features fully tested. All 29 API tests pass. The new features include: 1) Regression fixture system for creating and testing snapshots of validated accounts, 2) Pre-export summary metadata with validation_status, can_export, blocking_issues_count, 3) Export safety guard that blocks export when validation fails (USDC/XLM orphan disposals detected), 4) Recompute integrity enforcement, 5) Audit trail completeness, 6) All modular routes (review_queue_routes, validation_routes, proceeds_routes, price_backfill_routes, custody_core_routes) working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: Export safety guard correctly blocks export due to USDC/XLM orphan disposals - this is expected behavior
Regression fixture system creates snapshots with version tags and compares disposal_count, proceeds, cost_basis, gain_loss, validation_status, can_export
All 5 modular route files are properly integrated and working
seed_data_creation: Created new regression fixture during testing with version_tag test_fixture_YYYYMMDD_HHMMSS
context_for_next_testing_agent: Post-validation hardening features fully implemented and tested. Known fixture ID: d878078e-1101-4f32-bbbf-cff04f2b1a28 (golden_account_v1). Export is currently blocked due to USDC/XLM orphan disposals (3 critical issues). All modular routes are working correctly.

regression_fixture_system.POST /api/custody/regression/create-fixt: PASS - Creates snapshot with version_tag, disposal_count, total_proceeds, total_cost_basis, total_gain_loss, validation_status, can_export
regression_fixture_system.POST /api/custody/regression/run-test/{f: PASS - Runs regression test comparing all metrics, returns passed/failed with mismatches
regression_fixture_system.GET /api/custody/regression/fixtures: PASS - Lists all fixtures with metadata

pre_export_summary.GET /api/custody/beta/pre-export-check: PASS - Returns validation_status, can_export, blocking_issues_count, unresolved_review_count, export_blocked_reason

export_safety_guard.GET /api/custody/export-form-8949: PASS - Blocks export when validation fails (can_export=false), returns detailed blocking issues
export_safety_guard.GET /api/custody/export-form-8949?force=: PASS - Bypasses validation and exports CSV

recompute_integrity.POST /api/custody/validate/recompute: PASS - Triggers full recompute, returns recompute_triggered, reason, cleared_lots, cleared_disposals

audit_trail.GET /api/custody/validate/audit-trail: PASS - Returns audit entries with action, timestamp, details

blocking_issues: USDC orphan disposal - disposed more than acquired
XLM orphan disposal - disposed more than acquired
